title: Ed-ready Architecture Work
summary: Cloud-backed educational lab infrastructure and documentation alignment work focused on onboarding, stack comprehension, and architecture clarity.

logs.title: Created 10-day onboarding architecture for the technical stack
logs.details: Mapped the technical stack into a structured onboarding path covering frontend, cloud services, storage, identity, lab access, and system communication flow.

logs.title: Documentation audit
logs.details: Reviewing existing documentation against the actual codebase and updating documentation to account for codebase changes, implementation reality, and missing architectural context.

nextSteps: Map implementation details to architectural diagrams
Convert findings into recruiter/client-readable project notes
